EnvelopeFrame Struct Reference

A segmented envelope reads an array of EnvelopeFrame structures. More...

#include <csyn.h>

List of all members.

Public Attributes

double env_Duration
 Time it takes to get to the target value from previous value.

double env_Value
 Target value for this segment.

Detailed Description

A segmented envelope reads an array of EnvelopeFrame structures.

This is used with CSyn_WriteEnvelope().

Member Data Documentation

double EnvelopeFrame::env_Duration
 

Time it takes to get to the target value from previous value.

double EnvelopeFrame::env_Value
 

Target value for this segment.
